# Donna Upcycles It

> One-of-one upcycled denim jackets, jeans, and totes handmade by Donna in Portland, Oregon.

Donna Upcycles It is a small independent shop run by Donna from her kitchen studio in Portland, OR.
She rescues old denim from thrift stores, estate sales, and skips, then reworks each piece into a
one-of-a-kind wearable. Every piece is washed twice, inspected, hand-cut, machine-sewn, and signed
in the inner seam with a drop number. No two pieces are ever the same.

Custom orders are open year-round — customers can bring their own denim or commission a bespoke piece.

## Key pages

- Homepage: https://donnaupcyclesit.com
- Shop (all products): https://donnaupcyclesit.com/shop
- Shop by category: https://donnaupcyclesit.com/shop?category=Jackets
  (also: Jeans, Totes, Other)
- Journal (sewing tips & behind-the-scenes): https://donnaupcyclesit.com/journal
- About Donna: https://donnaupcyclesit.com/about
- Custom orders & contact: https://donnaupcyclesit.com/contact
- Sitemap: https://donnaupcyclesit.com/sitemap.xml

## Products

Products fall into three categories: Jackets, Jeans, and Totes. Each is priced individually and
listed with size, fabric, sourcing origin, care instructions, and a description. Status is one of:
available, sold, or reserved. Each item has a unique slug used in the URL /shop/[slug].

Pricing is in USD. Shipping is free over $80. Returns accepted within 14 days.

## Journal

The journal contains posts by Donna covering sewing tips, new product announcements, behind-the-scenes
posts from her workshop, and customer stories. Posts are tagged with one of:
"Sewing tips", "New product", "Behind the scenes", or "Customer stories".

## Custom orders

Donna takes custom orders year-round. Customers can send their own denim (e.g. a grandparent's old
jeans) or describe a bespoke piece. Process: 50% deposit to start, balance when it ships,
3–4 weeks from agreed brief to delivery. Contact form: https://donnaupcyclesit.com/contact

## About Donna

Donna is a self-taught denim reworker based in Portland, Oregon. She started with one pair of
Levi's 501s she couldn't bring herself to throw away. She sources exclusively from thrift stores,
estate sales, and skips. Her studio is her kitchen table.

## Technical

- Platform: Next.js (App Router) + Sanity CMS + Stripe + Resend
- Payments: Stripe Checkout (USD, card only)
- Email: Resend
- CMS: Sanity Studio at /studio (not publicly accessible to crawlers)
